'''Illarreen''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Herios sector/Legends|Herios sector]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Poss'Nomin]] [[Species/Legends|species]], who originally evolved on the planet's island continent [[Vhin]]. After climate change transformed their habitat into a wasteland, the Poss'Nomin expanded across their homeworld's surface, over time forming powerful nations that ultimately fought a global war.

At that time, approximately a [[Standard century/Legends|century]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a group of offworld [[Merchant/Legends|traders]] made first contact with the species. As a result, the Poss'Nomin ceased fighting and, within the span of a [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]], formed a united [[Poss'Nomin government|planetary government]]. Over the following century, one-third of Illarreen's population adopted [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] standard technology, a change that transformed the Poss'Nomin society but also indirectly led to a depressed planetary economy that many members of the species left behind by traveling offworld.

==Description==
Illarreen was a [[Temperature/Legends|temperate]]<ref name="CSWE Illarreen" /> terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Journal14" /> located in the [[Illarreen system/Legends|Illarreen system]], a part of the [[Herios sector/Legends|Herios sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It possessed abundant reserves of [[Beryllium/Legends|beryllium]] [[Ore/Legends|ore]].<ref name="Journal14" />

==History==
The [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Poss'Nomin]] [[Species/Legends|species]] evolved along the eastern shores of Illarreen's island continent [[Vhin]]. Due to sudden, intense climatic changes that were possibly caused by a [[Solar flare/Legends|solar flare]], however, that region turned into an uninhabitable wasteland within the span of a few [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]]. In response, the Poss'Nomin rapidly spread inland, eventually also crafting [[Boat/Legends|boats]] in order to reach other regions on Illarreen. Over time, prosperous local civilizations developed across the planet.<ref name="Journal14" />

[[File:PossNomin-Journal14.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Illarreen was the homeworld of the Poss'Nomin.]]
A few [[Millennium/Legends|thousand years]] later, a number of powerful Poss'Nomin nations had emerged. Eventually, conflicts between them led to the species' first global war. During that time, barely<ref name="Journal14" /> a century before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="CSWE Illarreen" /> a group of [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Merchant/Legends|traders]] chanced upon the previously unexplored Illarreen. Deciding to investigate the planet, the traders encountered the Poss'Nomin, who were engaged in massive global warfare. In order to comprehend the nature of the visitors, the species immediately stopped fighting, and within a [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]], the Illarreen nations had united and formed a planetary [[Poss'Nomin government]] in order to become a part of the [[galactic community]] and adopt [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] technology.<ref name="Journal14" />

The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] financed the society of Illarreen's adoption of [[Galaxy/Legends|galactic]] technology, which was a practice that stopped after the [[Declaration of a New Order|rise]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="Journal14" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Afterward, the planetary economy stagnated, and, in order to raise [[Currency/Legends|funds]] for its revitalization, the Poss'Nomin government auctioned off expansive tracts of publicly owned land. Those territories were mostly acquired by influential offworld [[Mining/Legends|mining]] companies,<ref name="Journal14" /> and at some point mining operations were set up on Illarreen's surface.<ref name="CSWE Illarreen" />

==Inhabitants==
{{Main|Poss'Nomin}}
[[File:PossNomin-AlienEncounters.png|thumb|right|300px|The Poss'Nomin had a predisposition toward exploration and adventure.]]
Illarreen was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the Poss'Nomin, a species of three-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]], [[Diet/Legends|omnivorous]] bulky<ref name="Journal14" /> [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]].<ref name="CSWE Poss'Nomin">{{CSWECite|III|39|Poss'Nomin}}</ref> A century before the Galactic Civil War, the Poss'Nomin had formed several nations that each had differing priorities and forms of government. After the species' first contact with off-worlders, those nations formed a global government in which quasi-independent regional governments held most of the authority.<ref name="Journal14" />

At the time of the first contact, the Poss'Nomin had begun experimenting with atomic energy, and over the following century, approximately one-third of Illarreen's population—mostly in the planet's more affluent regions—adopted galactic standard technology. That change had a significant effect on the Poss'Nomin, who began fundamentally restructuring their facilities and even way of thinking as a result. However, the process of technological adoption was also highly expensive, and, after offworld funding for it dried up, a substantial gap widened between wealthy and poor Poss'Nomin. Afterward, many Poss'Nomin, who, as a species, harbored a psychological predisposition toward adventure-seeking and exploration originating in their early history, left behind their homeworld and its depressed economy in order to travel throughout the wider galaxy.<ref name="Journal14" />

==Locations==
The island continent Vhin was located in Illarreen's northern hemisphere, and its eastern coastal region possessed an abundance of natural resources. However, at some point drastic climate changes rendered Vhin's eastern shores uninhabitable.<ref name="Journal14" />

==Behind the scenes==
Illarreen was first mentioned in "[[Alien Encounters (article series)|Alien Encounters]]," a feature written by [[Trevor J. Wilson]] and [[Craig Robert Carey]] and published in the [[August]] [[1997]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 14|fourteenth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' magazine.<ref name="Journal14" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Illarreen [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square T-16.<ref name="TEA" />
